name: cert_hound_monitor
description: Multi-client SSL certificate monitoring with parallel fan-out and tiered alerting

inputParameters.expression: (function() { var result = []; var clients = $.clients; for (var i = 0; i < clients.length; i++) { result.push({client_name: clients[i].client_name, urls: clients[i].urls, expiration_window_days: $.expiration_window_days}); } return {fork_inputs: result}; })()

(function() { var j = $.join_result || {}; var ew = $.expiration_window_days || 30; var sev = 'healthy'; for (var key in j) { var c = j[key]; if (!c || !c.details) continue; for (var i = 0; i < c.details.length; i++) { var r = c.details[i]; if (r.error || r.days_remaining <= 7) { sev = 'critical'; break; } if (r.days_remaining <= ew && sev !== 'critical') sev = 'warning'; } if (sev === 'critical') break; } return {worst_severity: sev}; })()
(function() { return {service: 'pagerduty', priority: 'P1', message: 'CRITICAL: One or more certificates need immediate attention'}; })()
(function() { return {service: 'email', to: 'security-team@company.com', subject: 'CRITICAL: Certificate alert', message: 'One or more certificates are expired or expiring within 7 days'}; })()
(function() { return {service: 'slack', channel: '#security-warnings', message: 'WARNING: One or more certificates expiring soon'}; })()
(function() { return {service: 'email', to: 'security-team@company.com', subject: 'WARNING: Certificate alert', message: 'One or more certificates are expiring within the monitoring window'}; })()
(function() { return {service: 'slack', channel: '#security-info', message: 'All certificates are healthy'}; })()
